title: quercus mangdenensis
intro: Quercus mangdenensis, also known as Chinese White Oak or Mangshan Oak, is a deciduous tree species native to China. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for centuries, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Its medicinal properties include treating fever, sore throat, and digestive issues, while its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Quercus mangdenensis is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
